title: Hourly to Salary Calculator - Convert Hourly Wage to Annual
description: Free hourly to salary calculator. Convert your hourly wage to annual, monthly, and weekly salary. See what your hourly rate equals as a yearly salary.
keywords: hourly to salary calculator, hourly to annual salary, wage to salary converter, hourly rate to yearly
intro: Convert your hourly wage to an equivalent annual salary. Enter your hourly rate and hours worked to see yearly, monthly, and weekly earnings.

faq.q: How do I convert hourly to salary?
faq.a: Multiply your hourly rate × hours per week × 52 weeks. For example, $20/hr × 40 hrs × 52 = $41,600 annual salary.

faq.q: How many work hours in a year?
faq.a: A standard full-time year is 2,080 hours (40 hours/week × 52 weeks). Accounting for holidays and PTO, actual hours may be around 1,920-2,000.
This calculator shows gross pay only. Total compensation including benefits (health insurance, 401k, etc.) is typically 20-30% higher.
